news_headline: 42,000 people assisted with a month of food across Al Obeid
news_summary: ICRC reported that 42,000 people were assisted with a month's worth of food across camps and urban settlements in Al Obeid.
citation_text: ICRC reported that 42,000 people were assisted with a month's worth of food across camps and urban settlements in Al Obeid.

news_headline: Over 7,000 children and lactating women receive nutritional supplements
news_summary: Nutritional supplements were distributed to over 7,000 children and pregnant and lactating women in Al Obeid food assistance.
citation_text: ICRC reported that nutritional supplements were distributed to over 7,000 children and pregnant and lactating women.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-021; child_flag set in persons per_007.

news_headline: Over 850 weapon-wounded patients treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital
news_summary: More than 850 weapon-wounded patients were treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital since the beginning of the year.
citation_text: ICRC reported that more than 850 weapon-wounded patients were treated at Al Obeid Teaching Hospital since the beginning of the year.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-022; entity ENT-P2-06 Al Obeid Teaching Hospital.

news_headline: Cholera-prevention and sanitation activities for 6,000 displaced households
news_summary: ICRC documented cholera-prevention and sanitation activities for 6,000 displaced households in Al Obeid displacement sites.
citation_text: ICRC documented that cholera-prevention and sanitation activities are being conducted for 6,000 displaced households.

news_headline: Rehabilitated water infrastructure to serve ~2.4 million in Khartoum
news_summary: Rehabilitated water pumps and treatment equipment are expected to provide safe water access to approximately 2.4 million people in Khartoum state.
citation_text: ICRC reported rehabilitation and donation of water pumps and treatment equipment expected to provide safe water access to approximately 2.4 million people in Khartoum state.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-030 (2025 impact summary).

news_headline: 36 trained Red Crescent volunteers deployed across 12 displacement sites
news_summary: ICRC reported that 36 trained Red Crescent volunteers are deployed across 12 displacement sites in Al Obeid providing first aid.
citation_text: ICRC reported that 36 trained Red Crescent volunteers are deployed across 12 displacement sites in Al Obeid.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-025; entity ENT-P2-02 Sudanese Red Crescent.

news_headline: ACLED records sustained heavy clashes in Khartoum with civilian displacement
news_summary: ACLED reported sustained heavy clashes in Khartoum resulting in large-scale displacement and reports of civilian casualties; exact figures vary across sources.
citation_text: ACLED reported sustained heavy clashes in Khartoum resulting in large-scale displacement and reports of civilian casualties.

news_headline: Displaced families flee Al Fasher hostilities to Tawila town
news_summary: Hundreds of displaced families fled hostilities and violence in Al Fasher, seeking shelter in Tawila town in North Darfur.
citation_text: ICRC reported that hundreds of displaced families fled hostilities and violence in Al Fasher, seeking shelter in Tawila town.
